content_en:
And Ahmad related it from the hadith of Sho'bah, from Anas — that the Messenger of Allah ig said, “Were you to know what I know, you would laugh only a little, and you would cry much.”

Anas ibn Maalik .t related that the Prophet ig said to Jibreel, “Why is it that I have never seen Meekaaeel laughing?” Jibreel #¢ said, “He has not laughed since the Hellfire was created.” (Ahmad)

The Hellfire Complained To Its Lord That It Was Eating Itself Up

Abu Hurairah 4s related that the Prophet #% said, “The Hellfire complained to its Lord, saying, ‘My Lord, part of me has eaten other parts (of me), so give me breath (or ventilation)’ He #¢ gave it permission to breath (or give vent) twice every year. The coldest thing you will find is the bitter cold of Hell; and the most intense heat you will find is the heat of Hell.” (Ahmad) Bukhaaree and Muslim related it from the hadith of Az-Zuhree.

The Severe Heat Of Hell Is Hotter Than All Else

Abu Hurairah . related that the Prophet #@ said, “The Hellfire complained to its Lord, saying, ‘Part of me has eaten another part (of me).’ He 4& gave it permission to give vent twice: to give vent in the winter and to give vent in the summer. And the most extreme heat is the extreme heat of Hell.”” (Ahmad) And with the same chain to the Messenger of Allah #8, he 24 said, “If the heat becomes severe, then. make yourselves cold with the prayer (i.e, delay the prayer until the temperature cools down), for severity of heat is from the severe heat of Hell.”

Book of The End: Great Trials and Tribulations 521

Allah # said: vb oS ss BS Wall 0 BK 4g B cS Bait

A 0 ae $B GGL 0 LAG ob GS To

When The Richest And Most Comfortable Of People In The World From The Dwellers Of The Hellfire Is Dipped Into It, He Will Forget All Of The Delights He Tasted; And When The Most Poor And Afflicted Of People In The World From The Dwellers Of Paradise Enters Paradise, He Will Forget All Of The Affliction That He Tasted

Anas ibn Maalik reported that the Messenger of Allah # said, “The most rich and comfortable of people in the world, who also is from the dwellers of the Hellfire, will be brought on the Day of Resurrection, and he will be dyed (i.e., dipped) once in the Hellfire. Then it will be said to him, ‘O son of Adam, have you ever seen delight? Have blessings ever passed by you?’ He will say, “No, by Allah, O my Lord’ Then the most poor and afflicted of people in the world, who is from the inhabitants of Paradise, will be brought and he will be dyed once in Paradise. Then it will be said to him, ‘O son

522 Book of The End: Great Trials and Tribulations

of Adam, have you ever seen misery? Has harshness ever passed by you?’ He will say, ‘No, by Allah, O my Lord, misery never came over me, and I have never seen harshness or affliction.” (Ahmad)

If A Disbeliever Had Enough Gold To Fill The Earth And Then Tried To Ransom Himself From The Punishment On The Day Of Resurrection,

It Would Not Be Accepted From Him

Anas ibn Maalik - related that the Prophet said, “A disbeliever is brought on the Day of Resurrection, and it will be said to him, ‘Suppose you had gold equal to the size of the earth, would you ransom it (to be saved)?’ He will say, ‘Yes.’ It will be said, ‘Something easier than that was asked of you.’ And that is the saying of Allah:

“Verily, those who disbelieved, and died while they were disbelievers, the (whole) earth full of gold will not be accepted from anyone of them even if they offered it as a ransom’)

(Ahmad) And Allah 3 knows best.

Anas ibn Maalik related that the Prophet #¢ said, “On the Day of Resurrection, it will be said to one of the dwellers of Hell, ‘Were you to have something (of value) which would fill the entire surface of the earth, would you offer it as a ransom?’ He will say, ‘Yes.” The Prophet 3 said, “Then Allah — ‘Azza Wo-Jall (to Him belongs Might and Majesty) — will say, ‘I wanted from you something simpler than that. I took upon you from the back of Adam that you would not associate any partners with Me (in worship), but you insisted on associating partners with Me.’ (Ahmad)

Book of The End: Great Trials and Tribulations 523

On The Day Of Resurrection, The Believer Will Hope To Return To The World In Order To Fight In The Way Of Allah And Be Killed, Because Of What He Sees From The Virtue And Superiority Of Martyrdom And Martyrs

Anas ibn Maalik 4 related that the Messenger of Allah 2g said, “A man from the dwellers of Paradise will be brought and it will be said, ‘O son of Adam, how have you found your abode to be? Ask and wish.’ He will say, ‘I do not ask and I do not wish other than You return me to the world, and I fight in the way of Allah ten times, saying that based on what he sees from the superiority of martyrdom. And a man from the dwellers of Hell will be brought, and it will be said to him, ‘O son of Adam, how have you found your abode to be?’ He will say, ‘O my Lord, It is the most evil abode.’ He will say, ‘Would you ransom it with the an earth full of gold?’ He will say, ‘O my Lord, Yes.’ He & will say, “You have lied. I have asked you for less than that and for something simpler, and you have not done so.’ Then he is returned to Hell.” (Ahmad)

Abu Hurairah related that the Messenger of Allah 2% said, “The likeness of Hell has not been seen: the one who flees from it has slept. And the likeness of Paradise has not been seen: the one who seeks it has slept.”

Abu Hurairah # related that the Messenger of Allah # said, “Were there 100,000 or more on the floor of the Masjid, and among them there was a man from the dwellers of Hell, and he breathed, the Masjid and those in it would burn.” (Related by Al-Haafiz Abu Ya‘laa and others) This hadith is extremely Ghareeb.

524 Book of The End: Great Trials and Tribulations

A Description Of The Hellfire And The Hugeness Of Its Inhabitants — May Allah % Protect Us From It By His Favor, Generosity, Kindness,

And Grace, Aameen; Indeed, He Is Able To Do Whatsoever He % Wills

Allah 8 said: “Verily the hypocrites will be in the lowest depth (grade) of the Fire; no helper will you find for them’)

And Allah & said:

Be ARE Wh ve ode ae fe

GC O55 Ho Byes 2% o Kush CE KE “But as for him whose balance (of good deeds) will be light, And he will have his home in Hawiyah (pit, ie, Hell). And what will make you know what it is? (It is) a fiercely blazing Fire!”

And Allah 4 said:

“Theirs will be a bed of Hell (Fire), and over them coverings (of Fiell-Fire). Thus do We recompense the Zalimun (polytheists and wrong doers). But those who believed (in the Oneness of Allah 8% — Islamic Monotheism), and worked righteousness-We tax not any person beyond his scope’

And Allah % said: AS gf Gl 3h 9 bs mae GI st >

Book of The End: Great Trials and Tribulations 525

“The Day when they will be pushed down by force to the fire of Hell, with a horrible forceful pushing. This is the Fire you used to belie’

And Allah 4% said:

“(Allah $8 will say to the angels): “Both of you throw into Hell every stubborn disbeliever (in the Oneness of Allah %, in His Messengers, etc.)F And Allah $8 said: Pavan Can a 4h 4 BUS SS Ba Mh oe

“On the Day when We will say to Hell: “Are you filled?” It will say: “Are there any more (to come)?13)

An Evil Word Spoken Without One Feeling Its Implications Makes Its Speaker Plunge Deep Into The Fire Of Hell, Farther Than The Distance Between The East And The West

In a hadith related by both Bukhaaree and Muslim, the Messenger of Allah 2% said, “Hell will continue to be thrown into and it will say, ‘Are there any more (to come)?’ Until the Lord of Glory places His Two Feet in it, and then it will withdraw into itself, and it will say, ‘Sufficient, sufficient, by Your Glory.”

Abu Hurairah # related that the Prophet 2% said, “Indeed, a man speaks a word, making his sitting companions laugh because of it, and he will sink because of it farther than Ath-Thurayyah.” (Related by ‘Abdullah ibn Al-Mubaarak) It is Ghareeb.

526 Book of The End : Great Trials and Tribulations
content_id:
Dan Ahmad meriwayatkannya dari hadith Shu'bah, dari Anas — bahwa Rasulullah # bersabda, "Seandainya kalian mengetahui apa yang aku ketahui, niscaya kalian akan tertawa sedikit saja, dan kalian akan banyak menangis."

Anas ibn Maalik # meriwayatkan bahwa Nabi # berkata kepada Jibril, "Mengapa aku belum pernah melihat Mikaaeel tertawa?" Jibril # menjawab, "Ia tidak pernah tertawa sejak neraka Jahannam diciptakan." (Ahmad)

Neraka Jahannam Mengadu Kepada Tuhannya Bahwa Ia Memakan Dirinya Sendiri

Abu Hurairah # meriwayatkan bahwa Nabi # bersabda, "Neraka Jahannam mengadu kepada Tuhannya, seraya berkata, 'Wahai Tuhanku, sebagian dariku telah memakan bagian lainnya (dari diriku), maka berilah aku napas (atau ventilasi).' Ia memberinya izin untuk bernapas (atau melepaskan) dua kali setiap tahun. Hal paling dingin yang akan kalian temukan adalah dinginnya hawa dingin neraka Jahannam; dan panas paling intens yang akan kalian temukan adalah panas neraka Jahannam." (Ahmad) Bukhaaree dan Muslim meriwayatkannya dari hadith Az-Zuhree.

Panas Neraka Yang Dahsyat Lebih Panas Dari Segalanya

Abu Hurairah # meriwayatkan bahwa Nabi # bersabda, "Neraka Jahannam mengadu kepada Tuhannya, seraya berkata, 'Sebagian dariku telah memakan bagian lainnya (dari diriku).' Ia memberinya izin untuk melepaskan dua kali: untuk melepaskan di musim dingin dan untuk melepaskan di musim panas. Dan panas yang paling ekstrem adalah panas neraka Jahannam." (Ahmad) Dan dengan sanad yang sama kepada Rasulullah #, beliau # bersabda, "Jika panas menjadi sangat terik, maka dinginkanlah diri kalian dengan shalat (yakni, tundakanlah shalat hingga suhu mendingin), karena teriknya panas berasal dari dahsyatnya panas neraka Jahannam."

Kitab Akhir Zaman: Fitnah dan Cobaan Besar 521

Allah # berfirman:

Ketika Orang Yang Paling Kaya Dan Paling Nyaman Di Dunia Dari Penghuni Neraka Jahannam Dicelupkan Ke Dalamnya, Ia Akan Melupakan Semua Kenikmatan Yang Pernah Ia Rasakan; Dan Ketika Orang Yang Paling Miskin Dan Paling Menderita Di Dunia Dari Penghuni Surga Memasuki Surga, Ia Akan Melupakan Semua Penderitaan Yang Pernah Ia Rasakan

Anas ibn Maalik melaporkan bahwa Rasulullah # bersabda, "Orang yang paling kaya dan paling nyaman di dunia, yang juga termasuk penghuni neraka Jahannam, akan dibawa pada Hari Kebangkitan, dan ia akan dicelupkan sekali ke dalam neraka Jahannam. Kemudian akan dikatakan kepadanya, 'Wahai anak Adam, pernahkah kamu merasakan kenikmatan? Pernahkah keberkahan melewatimu?' Ia akan berkata, 'Tidak, demi Allah, wahai Tuhanku.' Kemudian orang yang paling miskin dan paling menderita di dunia, yang termasuk penduduk surga, akan dibawa dan ia akan dicelupkan sekali ke dalam surga. Kemudian akan dikatakan kepadanya, 'Wahai anak

522 Kitab Akhir Zaman: Fitnah dan Cobaan Besar

Adam, pernahkah kamu merasakan penderitaan? Pernahkah kesulitan melewatimu?' Ia akan berkata, 'Tidak, demi Allah, wahai Tuhanku, penderitaan tidak pernah menimpaku, dan aku tidak pernah melihat kesulitan atau derita.'" (Ahmad)

Jika Seorang Kafir Memiliki Emas Sebesar Bumi Dan Kemudian Mencoba Menebusnya Dari Hukuman Pada Hari Kebangkitan, Hal Itu Tidak Akan Diterima Darinya

Anas ibn Maalik # meriwayatkan bahwa Nabi # bersabda, "Seorang kafir dibawa pada Hari Kebangkitan, dan dikatakan kepadanya, 'Seandainya kamu memiliki emas sebesar bumi, apakah kamu akan menebusnya (untuk diselamatkan)?' Ia akan berkata, 'Ya.' Dikatakan, 'Sesuatu yang lebih mudah dari itu telah diminta darimu.' Dan itulah firman Allah: 'Sesungguhnya orang-orang yang kafir dan meninggal dalam keadaan kafir, maka (seluruh) emas sepenuh bumi tidak akan diterima dari seorang pun di antara mereka meskipun mereka menawarkannya sebagai tebusan.'" (Ahmad) Dan Allah # Maha Mengetahui.

Anas ibn Maalik meriwayatkan bahwa Nabi # bersabda, "Pada Hari Kebangkitan, akan dikatakan kepada salah seorang penghuni neraka, 'Seandainya kamu memiliki sesuatu (yang berharga) yang bisa memenuhi seluruh permukaan bumi, apakah kamu akan menawarkannya sebagai tebusan?' Ia akan berkata, 'Ya.' Nabi # berkata, 'Kemudian Allah — 'Azza wa Jall (bagi-Nya segala kemuliaan dan keagungan) — akan berkata, 'Aku menginginkan sesuatu yang lebih sederhana dari itu darimu. Aku mengambil janji dari punggung Adam bahwa kamu tidak akan menyekutukan-Ku dengan apapun (dalam ibadah), tetapi kamu bersikeras menyekutukan-Ku.'" (Ahmad)

Kitab Akhir Zaman: Fitnah dan Cobaan Besar 523

Pada Hari Kebangkitan, Orang Beriman Akan Berharap Untuk Kembali Ke Dunia Untuk Berjuang Di Jalan Allah Dan Terbunuh, Karena Apa Yang Ia Lihat Dari Keutamaan Dan Keunggulan Syahid

Anas ibn Maalik # meriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah # bersabda, "Seseorang dari penghuni surga akan dibawa dan dikatakan, 'Wahai anak Adam, bagaimana kamu menemukan tempat tinggalmu? Mintalah dan berharaplah.' Ia akan berkata, 'Aku tidak meminta dan aku tidak berharap selain kamu mengembalikanku ke dunia, dan aku berjuang di jalan Allah sepuluh kali,' mengatakan itu berdasarkan apa yang ia lihat dari keutamaan kesyahidan. Dan seseorang dari penghuni neraka akan dibawa, dan dikatakan kepadanya, 'Wahai anak Adam, bagaimana kamu menemukan tempat tinggalmu?' Ia akan berkata, 'Wahai Tuhanku, Itulah seburuk-buruk tempat tinggal.' Ia akan berkata, 'Apakah kamu akan menebus dirinya dengan sepenuh bumi emas?' Ia akan berkata, 'Wahai Tuhanku, Ya.' Ia # akan berkata, 'Kamu telah berbohong. Aku meminta darimu yang lebih sedikit dari itu dan sesuatu yang lebih sederhana, dan kamu tidak melakukannya.' Kemudian ia dikembalikan ke neraka." (Ahmad)

Abu Hurairah meriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah # bersabda, "Belum pernah ada yang menyerupai neraka Jahannam: orang yang lari darinya telah tertidur. Dan belum pernah ada yang menyerupai surga: orang yang mencarinya telah tertidur."

Abu Hurairah # meriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah # bersabda, "Seandainya ada 100.000 orang atau lebih di lantai Masjid, dan di antara mereka ada seorang laki-laki dari penghuni neraka, lalu ia bernapas, niscaya Masjid dan mereka yang ada di dalamnya akan terbakar." (Diriwayatkan oleh Al-Haafiz Abu Ya'laa dan lainnya) Hadith ini sangat Ghareeb.

524 Kitab Akhir Zaman: Fitnah dan Cobaan Besar

Gambaran Neraka Jahannam Dan Besarnya Penghuninya — Semoga Allah # Melindungi Kita Darinya Dengan Karunia, Kemurahan, Kelembutan, Dan Rahmat-Nya, Amin; Sesungguhnya Ia Mampu Melakukan Apa Saja Yang Ia # Kehendaki

Allah # berfirman: "Sesungguhnya orang-orang munafik itu (ditempatkan) pada tingkatan yang paling bawah dari neraka. Dan kamu sekali-kali tidak akan mendapat seorang penolong pun bagi mereka."

Dan Allah # berfirman: "Dan adapun orang-orang yang ringan timbangan (amal kebaikan)nya, maka tempat kembalinya adalah Hawiyah (lubang, yaitu neraka). Dan tahukah kamu apakah itu? (Yaitu) api yang sangat panas!"

Dan Allah # berfirman: "Tempat tidur mereka dari neraka (api), dan di atas mereka penutup (dari api neraka). Demikianlah Kami memberi balasan kepada orang-orang yang zalim (musyrik dan orang-orang yang berbuat aniaya). Dan orang-orang yang beriman (kepada Keesaan Allah — Tauhid Islam) serta beramal saleh, Kami tidak memikulkan kewajiban kepada diri seseorang melainkan sekedar kesanggupannya."

Dan Allah # berfirman:

Kitab Akhir Zaman: Fitnah dan Cobaan Besar 525

"Hari ketika mereka didorong-dorong dengan kasar ke api neraka Jahannam. Inilah api neraka yang dahulu kalian mendustakannya."

Dan Allah # berfirman: "(Allah # akan berkata kepada para malaikat): 'Lemparkan olehmu berdua ke dalam neraka setiap orang yang sangat ingkar (terhadap keesaan Allah, para Rasul-Nya, dll.)!'" Dan Allah # berfirman: "Pada hari Kami berkata kepada neraka Jahannam: 'Apakah kamu sudah penuh?' Ia menjawab: 'Apakah masih ada lagi (yang akan datang)?'"

Satu Kata Buruk Yang Diucapkan Tanpa Merasakan Implikasinya Menyebabkan Pengucapnya Terjun Sangat Dalam Ke Dalam Api Neraka, Lebih Jauh Dari Jarak Antara Timur Dan Barat

Dalam sebuah hadith yang diriwayatkan oleh Bukhaaree dan Muslim, Rasulullah # bersabda, "Neraka Jahannam akan terus diisi dan ia akan berkata, 'Apakah masih ada lagi (yang akan datang)?' Hingga Tuhan Yang Mulia meletakkan dua kaki-Nya ke dalamnya, lalu neraka akan menyusut ke dalam dirinya, dan akan berkata, 'Cukup, cukup, demi kemuliaan-Mu.'"

Abu Hurairah # meriwayatkan bahwa Nabi # bersabda, "Sesungguhnya, seorang laki-laki mengucapkan sebuah kata, membuat teman-teman duduknya tertawa karenanya, dan ia akan tenggelam karenanya lebih jauh dari Ath-Thurayyah." (Diriwayatkan oleh 'Abdullah ibn Al-Mubaarak) Ini Ghareeb.

526 Kitab Akhir Zaman: Fitnah dan Cobaan Besar
content_ar: And أحمد related it from the الحديث of Sho'bah, from أنس — that الرسول ﷺ of الله ig said, “Were you لمعرفة what I know, you would laugh only a little, and you would cry much.” أنس ibn Maalik .t related that النبي ﷺ ig said to Jibreel, “Why is it that I have never seen Meekaaeel laughing?” Jibreel #¢ said, “He has not laughed بما أن the النار was created.” (أحمد) The النار Complained To Its Lord That It Was Eating Itself Up أبو هريرة 4s related that النبي ﷺ #% said, “The النار complained to its Lord, saying, ‘My Lord, part of me has eaten other parts (of me), لذا give me breath (or ventilation)’ He #¢ gave it permission to breath (or give vent) twice every year. The coldest thing you will find is the bitter cold of النار; and the most intense heat you will find is the heat of النار.” (أحمد) Bukhaaree and مسلم related it from the الحديث of Az-Zuhree. The Severe Heat Of النار Is Hotter Than All Else أبو هريرة . related that النبي ﷺ #@ said, “The النار complained to its Lord, saying, ‘Part of me has eaten another part (of me).’ He 4& gave it permission to give vent twice: to give vent in the winter and to give vent in the summer. And the most extreme heat is the extreme heat of النار.”” (أحمد) And with the same chain to الرسول ﷺ of الله #8, he 24 said, “إذا the heat becomes severe, then. make yourselves cold with the الصلاة (i.e, delay the الصلاة حتى the temperature cools down), for severity of heat is from the severe heat of النار.” الكتاب of The End: Great الابتلاءات and Tribulations 521 الله # said: vb oS ss BS Wall 0 BK 4g B cS Bait A 0 ae $B GGL 0 LAG ob GS To عندما The Richest And Most Comfortable Of People In The الدنيا From The Dwellers Of The النار Is Dipped Into It, He Will Forget All Of The Delights He Tasted; And عندما The Most Poor And Afflicted Of People In The الدنيا From The Dwellers Of الجنة Enters الجنة, He Will Forget All Of The Affliction That He Tasted أنس ibn Maalik reported that الرسول ﷺ of الله # said, “The most rich and comfortable of people in the الدنيا, who أيضاً is from the dwellers of the النار, will be brought on the Day of البعث, and he will be dyed (i.e., dipped) حين in the النار. Then it will be said to him, ‘O son of آدم, have you ever seen delight? Has harshness ever passed by you?’ He will say, ‘No, by الله, O my Lord, misery never came over me, and I have never seen harshness or affliction.” (أحمد) إذا A Disbeliever Had Enough Gold To Fill The Earth And Then Tried To Ransom Himself From The العقاب On The Day Of البعث, It Would Not Be Accepted From Him أنس ibn Maalik - related that النبي ﷺ said, “A disbeliever is brought on the Day of البعث, and it will be said to him, ‘Suppose you had gold equal to the size of the earth, would you ransom it (to be saved)?’ He will say, ‘Yes.’ It will be said, ‘Something easier than that was asked of you.’ And that is the saying of الله: “Verily, those who disbelieved, and died بينما they were disbelievers, the (whole) earth full of gold will not be accepted from anyone of them even إذا they offered it as a ransom’) (أحمد) And الله 3 knows best. أنس ibn Maalik related that النبي ﷺ #¢ said, “On the Day of البعث, it will be said to one of the dwellers of النار, ‘Were you to have something (of value) which would fill the entire surface of the earth, would you offer it as a ransom?’ He will say, ‘Yes.” النبي ﷺ 3 said, “Then الله — ‘Azza Wo-Jall (to Him belongs Might and Majesty) — will say, ‘I wanted from you something simpler than that. I took upon you from the back of آدم that you would not associate any partners with Me (in worship), but you insisted on associating partners with Me.’ (أحمد) الكتاب of The End: Great الابتلاءات and Tribulations 523 On The Day Of البعث, The المؤمن Will الأمل To Return To The الدنيا من أجل Fight In The الطريق Of الله And Be Killed, لأن Of What He Sees From The الفضيلة And Superiority Of Martyrdom And Martyrs أنس ibn Maalik 4 related that الرسول ﷺ of الله 2g said, “A man from the dwellers of الجنة will be brought and it will be said, ‘O son of آدم, how have you found your abode to be? Ask and wish.’ He will say, ‘I do not ask and I do not wish other than You return me to the الدنيا, and I fight in the الطريق of الله ten times, saying that based on what he sees from the superiority of martyrdom. And a man from the dwellers of النار will be brought, and it will be said to him, ‘O son of آدم, how have you found your abode to be?’ He will say, ‘O my Lord, It is the most الشر abode.’ He will say, ‘Would you ransom it with the an earth full of gold?’ He will say, ‘O my Lord, Yes.’ He & will say, “You have lied. I have asked you for less than that and for something simpler, and you have not done لذا.’ Then he is returned to النار.” (أحمد) أبو هريرة related that الرسول ﷺ of الله 2% said, “The likeness of النار has not been seen: the one who flees from it has slept.
